rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROBERT E. ANDERSON LIVING TRUST DATED MARCH 17, 2001
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Larry Anderson, Marion Greenfield, Willette Huey And Claudell Huey'S Motion For Order Releaseing Adult Protective Services Records
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Wednesday, December 31, 2008. Defendant Larry Anderson, Marion Greenfield's motion for an order releasing records is denied as Welfare and Institutions Code Section 15633.5 does not provide for release of specified information to private parties involved in litigation concerning allegations of fraud, conversion, and elder abuse. = (610/BEC)
